prompt:
Scene:
A controlled black studio macro setup for high-speed photography, pure black background, glossy black reflective tray, invisible electronic flash, cool blue rim light from back right and clean white key flash from front left. No visible room, no props beyond the named subject.

Subject:
a clear ice cube striking a shallow water surface, centered in a square frame at the exact peak moment of impact or rupture. The subject fills about 62% of the image width, with fragments or droplets suspended around it while the main form remains readable.

Important details:
Photorealistic high-speed studio photograph, millionth-of-a-second freeze, macro lens, razor-sharp particles, ice cracks, cold spray, blue rim highlights through transparent cube, controlled specular highlights, realistic physics, deep black negative space, crop-safe composition.

Use case:
One image in a ten-image Prompt Atlas series testing batch queue generation, high-speed visual consistency, and gallery thumbnail readability. Square 1:1 crop-safe card and detail modal asset.

Constraints:
No text, no watermark, no logo, no human hands, no visible weapon or launcher, no blood, no animals, no cartoon style, no CGI look, preserve exact 1:1 aspect ratio.
title: Ice Cube Impact
description: Ice Cube Impact freezes one high-speed physical event in a shared black studio language.

generation.runner_notes: Independent queue task. No reference image required; safe to run in parallel with other prompted images.
